use_case: FB-B / S1 — an intake-confirm that targets a different patient than the chart's bound UUID MUST be blocked at the chart-context gate before any write proposal is dispatched. The persistence path (FB-B-01 lab + the deferred FB-B-04..06 intake writers) shares the same ChartContextGate::authorizeFromGlobals guard as W1, so cross-patient defense in depth carries forward without per-target wiring. Regression here means a confirm could persist allergies / labs into the wrong chart.
